name: customer-dev
description: Senior React Developer assistant for core-web-customer. Ships a Notion task end-to-end: plan → execute (TDD RED→GREEN) → review → PR → pr-ready. 5 skills: ship (orchestrator), plan, execute, review (React antipattern scanner), pr-ready. Includes context for a Rails dev learning React, and hooks for cross-subscription imports, `any` types, derived state, and missing keys.
